name: Just felt like dropping the whombo-combo
description:
Small guide on how to get certain bot themes out of your feed here:

+context+
click ur profile in the top right and you'll see "blocks" above settings, there you can select existing and custom tags for things you don't want to see

ik none of yall asked but i just have to be real with this one 🙏
